ens.notes: Durin L2Registry (ENS track). base node = namehash(superjam.eth), owned by the server wallet (admin → can createSubnode/addRegistrar). VERIFIED LIVE: minted alice.superjam.eth (totalSupply 2), SubnodeCreated event confirmed. listFromEns reads this registry directly (no L1 needed). OPTIONAL L1 production-resolution: register superjam.eth on Sepolia ENS → setResolver(durinL1Resolver) → setL2Registry(l2Registry, 84532).

erc8004.notes: CANONICAL ERC-8004 reference registries (erc-8004/erc-8004-contracts), NOT deployed by us — bound to via packages/onchain/src/erc8004.ts. Deterministic CREATE2 addresses, same on Sepolia (11155111). Identity = ERC-721 agent NFTs (register(agentURI)→agentId); Reputation = giveFeedback(agentId,int128 rating,…). Verified live on Base Sepolia (eth_getCode non-empty). Set ERC8004_REGISTRY=identityRegistry to enable; reputation defaults to the paired address in the binding.
